schema.name: QCecuring - Enterprise Security Solutions
schema.description: QCecuring - Enterprise Security Solutions for certificate management, Code Signing, SSH Key Management, and HSM Services

schema.name: SSL Certificate Lifecycle Management | QCecuring Technologies
schema.description: Discover, provision, rotate and monitor SSL/TLS certificates and keys from a single control plane. Prevent outages, enforce policy, and automate PKI operations at scale.

schema.name: SSH Key Management - Secure Access Control | QCecuring Technologies
schema.description: Centralized SSH key management with automated scanning, reporting, and access control. Prevent key sprawl and unauthorized access to mission-critical systems.

schema.name: Code Signing - Secure Software Distribution | QCecuring Technologies
schema.description: Enterprise-grade code signing with workflow-based approval, HSM-backed private keys, and client-side hashing for secure software distribution.

schema.name: HSM as a Service | QCecuring Technologies
schema.description: Cloud-based Hardware Security Module service with FIPS compliance, cryptographic key management, and enterprise-grade security for sensitive operations.

schema.name: PKI as a Service - Automated Certificate Management | QCecuring
schema.description: Managed PKI service with automated lifecycle management, enterprise-grade security, and seamless cloud and hybrid integrations. Prevent outages and streamline certificate operations.

schema.name: Cloud Native Machine Identity Management - Kubernetes Security
schema.description: Advanced machine identity management for Kubernetes with cert-manager integration, comprehensive monitoring, and enterprise reporting capabilities.

schema.name: About QCecuring Technologies - Building Digital Trust, One Connection at a Time
schema.description: QCecuring Technologies helps businesses secure their digital world from every device to every transaction. We make trust and security easy so you can focus on growing your business with confidence.

schema.description: Empowering the next generation of cybersecurity innovators.

In Short: We collect personal information that you provide to us.

mainEntity.name: 2. HOW DO WE PROCESS YOUR INFORMATION?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Short: We process your information to provide, improve, and administer our Services, communicate with you, for security and fraud prevention, and to comply with law. We may also process your information for other purposes with your consent.

mainEntity.name: 3. WHEN AND WITH WHOM DO WE SHARE YOUR PERSONAL INFORMATION?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Short: We may share information in specific situations described in this section and/or with the following categories of third parties.

mainEntity.name: 4. DO WE USE COOKIES AND OTHER TRACKING TECHNOLOGIES?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Short: We may use cookies and other tracking technologies to collect and store your information.

mainEntity.name: 5. HOW LONG DO WE KEEP YOUR INFORMATION?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Short: We keep your information for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this privacy notice unless otherwise required by law.

mainEntity.name: 6. HOW DO WE KEEP YOUR INFORMATION SAFE?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Short: We aim to protect your personal information through a system of organizational and technical security measures.

mainEntity.name: 7. DO WE COLLECT INFORMATION FROM MINORS?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Short: We do not knowingly collect data from or market to children under 18 years of age.
In Short: You may review, change, or terminate your account at any time.

mainEntity.name: 10. DO CALIFORNIA RESIDENTS HAVE SPECIFIC PRIVACY RIGHTS?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Short: Yes, if you are a resident of California, you are granted specific rights regarding access to your personal information.

mainEntity.name: 11. DO WE MAKE UPDATES TO THIS NOTICE?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Short: Yes, we will update this notice as necessary to stay compliant with relevant laws.

3DES, also calledTriple DESorDES3, is asymmetric block cipherdesigned to extend the life of the original DES algorithm.
Discover how QCecuring can help you automate certificate lifecycle management, secure SSH keys, and protect your cryptographic infrastructure.

NIST SP 1800-16 is a specialized publication from the National Cybersecurity Center of Excellence (NCCoE). Unlike high-level frameworks, this is aPractice Guide. It doesn’t just tell you what to do; it demonstrateshowto do it using commercially available technologies.
Discover how QCecuring can help you automate certificate lifecycle management, secure SSH keys, and protect your cryptographic infrastructure.

Strong certificate mappingis Microsoft’s model for binding an X.509 authentication certificate to a specific Active Directory user or computer account using non‑ambiguous identifiers, primarily the Security Identifier (SID). Instead of loosely matching display names, UPNs, or email addresses, domain controllers now expect either an explicit mapping object or a certificate that embeds the SID of the principal.

https://www.qcecuring.com/product/certif.name: SSL Certificate Lifecycle Management | QCecuring Technologies
https://www.qcecuring.com/product/certif.description: Discover, provision, rotate and monitor SSL/TLS certificates and keys from a single control plane. Prevent outages, enforce policy, and automate PKI operations at scale.

https://www.qcecuring.com/product/ssh-ke.name: SSH Key Management - Secure Access Control | QCecuring Technologies
https://www.qcecuring.com/product/ssh-ke.description: Centralized SSH key management with automated scanning, reporting, and access control. Prevent key sprawl and unauthorized access to mission-critical systems.

https://www.qcecuring.com/product/code-s.name: Code Signing - Secure Software Distribution | QCecuring Technologies
https://www.qcecuring.com/product/code-s.description: Enterprise-grade code signing with workflow-based approval, HSM-backed private keys, and client-side hashing for secure software distribution.

https://www.qcecuring.com/product/hsm-as.name: HSM as a Service | QCecuring Technologies
https://www.qcecuring.com/product/hsm-as.description: Cloud-based Hardware Security Module service with FIPS compliance, cryptographic key management, and enterprise-grade security for sensitive operations.

https://www.qcecuring.com/product/pki-as.name: PKI as a Service - Automated Certificate Management | QCecuring
https://www.qcecuring.com/product/pki-as.description: Managed PKI service with automated lifecycle management, enterprise-grade security, and seamless cloud and hybrid integrations. Prevent outages and streamline certificate operations.

https://www.qcecuring.com/product/cloud-.name: Cloud Native Machine Identity Management - Kubernetes Security
https://www.qcecuring.com/product/cloud-.description: Advanced machine identity management for Kubernetes with cert-manager integration, comprehensive monitoring, and enterprise reporting capabilities.

https://www.qcecuring.com/about.name: About QCecuring Technologies - Building Digital Trust, One Connection at a Time
https://www.qcecuring.com/about.description: QCecuring Technologies helps businesses secure their digital world from every device to every transaction. We make trust and security easy so you can focus on growing your business with confidence.
